## Domain

<!-- What domain does this snippet cover? e.g., "Reinforcement Learning", "Federated Learning" -->

## Why It's Needed

<!-- What mistakes do AI agents make in this domain without explicit rules? Give 2-3 concrete examples. -->

## Draft Rules (optional)

<!-- If you have ideas for specific rules, list them here. Follow the Snippet Format Spec in CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

```markdown
# Snippet: [Domain Name]

## Domain Context
...

## [Section]
- ...

## Common Pitfalls
- ...
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked existing snippets and this domain is not already covered
- [ ] The proposed rules are specific and actionable (not generic advice)
